Guardians of the Galaxy Vol 3 (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $358,995,815Details
International Box Office $486,559,962
Worldwide Box Office $845,555,777
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,722,392
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $12,014,889
Total $17,737,281
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Peter Quill, still reeling from the loss of Gamora, must rally his team around him to defend the universe along with protecting one of their own. A mission that, if not completed successfully, could quite possibly lead to the end of the Guardians as we know them.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$118,414,021 (33.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.03 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$250,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,450 opening theaters/4,450 max. theaters, 6.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $392,467,089

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 5th, 2023 (Wide) by Walt Disney
May 5th, 2023 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: May 3rd, 2023 (Wide) (Vietnam)
May 3rd, 2023 (Wide), released as Guardians of he Galaxy Vol. 3 (銀河守護隊 3) (Hong Kong)
May 3rd, 2023 (Wide), released as Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3 (Denmark)
May 3rd, 2023 (Wide) (Netherlands)
May 3rd, 2023 (Wide) (Norway)
Video Release: July 7th, 2023 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action, strong language, suggestive/drug references and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2774 (cert #54328), 3/15/2023)
Running Time: 150 minutes
Franchise: Marvel Cinematic Universe, Guardians of the Galaxy

Synopsis

Peter Quill, still reeling from the loss of Gamora, must rally his team around him to defend the universe along with protecting one of their own. A mission that, if not completed successfully, could quite possibly lead to the end of the Guardians as we know them.

Opening Weekend:$118,414,021 (33.0% of total gross)

Domestic Share:42.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)

Theater counts:4,450 opening theaters/4,450 max. theaters, 6.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $392,467,089
